# Leo VI's Mass Vassal Directives - rule editor scripted GUIs
#
# GENERATED by tools/gen_panel.sh - edits here will be overwritten.
#
# A radio click runs two of these in order: a focus, which points the cursor at
# the node being edited, then a set, which writes one field to it. That split is
# what keeps this file to one entry per node plus one per option, instead of one
# per node-and-option pair - GUI cannot hand script a number, so the node cannot
# simply be an argument.
#
# None of these need is_shown: a radio reads its selected state straight from
# the variable it represents.

### Priority 1 nodes.
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n1 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 11 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n2 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 12 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n3 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 13 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n4 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 14 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n5 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 15 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n6 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 16 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n7 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 17 } }
}

### Node kind.
leo_mvd_set_kind_0 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 1 VALUE = 0 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_kind_1 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 1 VALUE = 1 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_kind_2 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 1 VALUE = 2 } }
}
